AVEMUJICA-PERFORM.description: Perform effects trigger if you have played the specified card types this turn.
AVEMUJICA-PERFORM.title: Perform
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.description: Adds the specified effect to the current [gold]Song[/gold]. If no effect is specified, choose a random effect to add. After [gold]Composing[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] times, add the [gold]Song[/gold] to your hand.
AVEMUJICA-COMPOSE.title: Compose
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.description: Summons a [gold]Doll[/gold] to assist you. [gold]Dolls[/gold] use their default ability at the end of your turn. You can trigger their skills if they have sufficient HP by clicking the buttons next to their intent.
AVEMUJICA-AWAKEN.title: Awaken
AVEMUJICA-DREAMSPIN.description:
Can target yourself to gain [gold]Dream Thread[/gold]. [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Dream Thread[/gold] is used to [gold]Awaken[/gold] a [gold]Doll[/gold].
Can target a [gold]Doll[/gold] to give the [gold]Doll[/gold] HP. Any [gold]Dream Thread[/gold] you have is consumed to give additional HP.
AVEMUJICA-DREAMSPIN.title: Dreamspin
AVEMUJICA-DOLL.title: Doll
